name: The Refuge Gates of the Atlantis
description:
You see a huge pair of gates. These gates appear to be carved almost
completely out of coral reef. A huge city appears to be on the other side of
these gates. There is also a impossibility of go ahead.
  Many citizens look directly to you, "the killer!" - they say.
From the other side,about 50 Guards are throw their tridents.
They are completely save  behind the gates...  
  There is a closed tunel on the ground thats looks like a Jail.FLEE!

exits.description: The guard post is north of you.
